name: Close-Up Baking & Setting Powder Translucent
description:
## ✍🏼 Description

With the Close-Up Baking & Setting Powder Translucent from NABLA Cosmetics, you can reliably set your make-up and give your complexion a smooth, silky-soft finish. The loose, translucent powder adapts to every skin tone and is ideal for setting or baking to visually minimize pores and fine lines.**The feather-light texture makes it comfortable to wear and keeps your make-up looking fresh all day long.Key benefits**

- Translucency suitable for all skin tones

- Perfect for setting and blending make-up

- Visibly minimizes pores and fine lines

- Light texture for a smooth, silky-soft finish

**More about this product**

Product type: PowderSize: 30 gApplication area: FaceSkin type: Suitable for all skin types

## 🌱 Ingredients

Aluminum Starch Octenylsuccinate, Talc, Magnesium Carbonate, Lauroyl Lysine, Octyldodecyl Stearoyl Stearate, Caprylic/capric Triglyceride, Mica, Diethylhexyl Syringylidenemalonate, Sorbic Acid. +/− (May Contain): CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), CI 77491 - CI 77492 - CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), CI 77007 (Ultramarines).

## 🙌🏼 Application

Apply the powder in small amounts to the desired area with a brush.

## ❗️ Cautions

For external use only. Avoid eye contact. If irritation occurs, discontinue use of the product. Keep out of reach of children.

Ein runder rosa Behälter mit Close-Up Baking & Setting Powder Translucent mit dekorativem Text auf dem Deckel.
Runde, rosafarbene Puderdose und sechseckige Verpackung von NABLA mit der Aufschrift „Close-Up Baking & Setting Powder“ auf beigem Hintergrund.
